about.title: About Travel Tree Overseas

about.description: Travel Tree Overseas is a leading travel agency specializing in GCC medical processing, KSA visa services, air ticketing, and comprehensive travel solutions. With years of experience and a dedicated team, we ensure seamless travel experiences for our clients.
about.mission: To provide reliable, efficient, and affordable travel services that make every journey memorable and hassle-free.
about.vision: To become the most trusted travel agency in Bangladesh, connecting people to opportunities across the globe.

services.title: GCC Medical Booking
services.description: Complete GCC medical test booking service. We handle the entire process from appointment scheduling to result delivery through our authorized medical account.

services.title: KSA Visa Processing
services.description: Complete Saudi Arabia visa processing service including work visa, visit visa, Hajj & Umrah visa with full documentation support.

services.title: Air Ticketing
services.description: Domestic and international air ticket booking at competitive prices. We partner with all major airlines to offer you the best deals.

services.title: Hotel Booking
services.description: Premium hotel booking services worldwide. From budget-friendly stays to luxury resorts, we find the perfect accommodation for you.

services.title: Manpower Export
services.description: Complete manpower recruitment and export services for GCC countries. We connect skilled workers with international opportunities.

services.title: Hajj & Umrah Packages
services.description: Comprehensive Hajj and Umrah packages with hotel accommodation, transportation, and guided tours. Making your spiritual journey memorable.

footer.description: Travel Tree Overseas is your trusted partner for all travel needs. From visa processing to air ticketing, we make your journey seamless.

terms:
# Terms and Conditions

## 1. Introduction
Welcome to Travel Tree Overseas. These terms and conditions outline the rules and regulations for the use of our services.

## 2. Services
Travel Tree Overseas provides travel-related services including but not limited to:
- GCC Medical booking and processing
- Visa processing and consultation
- Air ticket booking
- Hotel reservation
- Manpower export services

## 3. Payment Terms
- All payments must be made in advance before service delivery.
- For GCC Medical booking, full payment is required before appointment scheduling.
- Payment can be made via bank transfer, bKash, Nagad, or cash at our office.
- Refund policy applies as per service-specific terms.

## 4. Cancellation Policy
- Cancellation requests must be made at least 48 hours before the scheduled service.
- Cancellation fees may apply depending on the service type.
- Non-refundable services will be clearly mentioned at the time of booking.

## 5. Client Responsibilities
- Provide accurate and complete information.
- Submit all required documents on time.
- Ensure passport validity for at least 6 months.

## 6. Limitation of Liability
Travel Tree Overseas is not liable for:
- Visa rejection by embassy/consulate.
- Flight delays or cancellations by airlines.
- Medical test results or delays from medical centers.

## 7. Contact
For any questions about these terms, please contact us at info@traveltreeoverseas.com.
privacy:
# Privacy Policy

## 1. Information We Collect
We collect the following types of information:
- Personal identification information (name, email, phone, passport details)
- Payment information
- Travel preferences and history

## 2. How We Use Your Information
- To process your bookings and applications
- To communicate service updates
- To improve our services
- To comply with legal requirements

## 3. Data Protection
- All personal data is stored securely.
- We do not sell your information to third parties.
- Access to data is restricted to authorized personnel only.

## 4. Cookies
Our website may use cookies to enhance user experience.

## 5. Your Rights
- Access your personal data
- Request data correction
- Request data deletion
- Opt-out of marketing communications

## 6. Contact
For privacy-related inquiries, email us at privacy@traveltreeoverseas.com.
